Interface OpenApiDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi20Document, OpenApi2xDocument, OpenApi30Document, OpenApi31Document, OpenApi32Document, OpenApi3xDocument
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi20DocumentImpl, OpenApi30DocumentImpl, OpenApi31DocumentImpl, OpenApi32DocumentImpl
public interface OpenApiDocument extends Document
